description: Computes aggregations (sum, mean, min, max, count, median) for table rows or columns and displays the result at the table edge
utility: Display aggregated statistics for table columns or rows

arguments.name: index
arguments.description: 1-based row or column index to aggregate

arguments.name: direction
arguments.description: type(col) for column aggregation (result at bottom) or type(row) for row aggregation (result at right)

alternates.description: Sum of column 1, displayed at bottom
Mean of row 2 at right with blue text on yellow background

examples.scenario: Median of second row with color
